Spells — Female Human Wizard: 20
Strength: 15 (+2) Dexterity: 17 (+3) Constitution: 13 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 17 (+3)
Background: Entertainer Alignment: Lawful Neutral Deity: Erathis, The Lawbearer (LN)
Experience: 628109/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 225/450
Ability Notes: Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Maneuver): 2; Wizard (Arcane Tradition): 1
Feats: Elemental Adept (Thunder); Martial Adept; Polearm Master; Sharpshooter; Skulker Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Wizard Features: Arcane Recovery; Arcane Tradition; Divination Savant; Expert Divination; Greater Portent; Portent; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); School Of Divination; Signature Spells; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, Religion); Spell Mastery; Spellcasting; The Third Eye; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling) Fighter Features: Disarming Attack; Distracting Strike Entertainer Features: By Popular Demand; Skill Proficiency (Acrobatics; Performance); Tool Proficiency (Disguise Kit; Choose 1 from any Musical Instrument)
Feature Notes: Arcane Tradition: 1 selection
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +9 Insight: (wis) +3 Performance: (cha) +9
Animal Handling: (wis) +3 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +2 Medicine: (wis) +9 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +3
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +8 Perception: (wis) +3 Survival: (wis) +3
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; History; Medicine; Performance
Tool Proficiency: Disguise Kit; Flute
Languages: Common; Orc
Skill Notes:
By Popular Demand: Can receive welcome and lodging in exchange for performing
Skulker: Can hide when lightly obscured/Suffers no disadvantage on Perception from dim light
Combat
Hit Points: 93 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 13
Weapon Proficiency: Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Dagger (+9 1d4+3 P R20/60); Quarterstaff (+8 1d6+2 B [2h d8]); Sling (+9 1d4+3 B R30/120); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Martial Adept: Has the Combat Superiority feature with 2 maneuvers and 1 die
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Combat Superiority: Can use a d6 superiority die to perform one of 2 chosen maneuvers 1 time per short rest
Disarming Attack: Can add a superiority die to damage and cause the target to drop an item (save DC 17 Strength negates)
Distracting Strike: Can add a superiority die to damage and give advantage to the next ally attack against the same foe before the start of the next turn
Polearm Master: Can use a bonus action after attacking with a polearm to attack with the opposite end, inflicting 1d4 HP bludgeoning, and can make an opportunity attack against a foe who enters polearm reach
Sharpshooter: Suffers no disadvantage on ranged attacks at long range, ranged attacks ignore 3/4 cover, and can make a -5 attack with a ranged weapon to inflict +10 damage
Skulker: Misses on ranged attacks while hidden do not reveal position
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +8; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +9
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: W0: 5; W: 22 Spell Slots: W1: 4; W2: 3; W3: 3; W4: 3; W5: 3; W6: 2; W7: 2; W8: 1; W9: 1 Attack: W: +8 Spell DC: W: 16
Spells:
Dark Star (W8 Evoc): (Action) R150' 40' radius sphere inflicts 8d10 HP force (save Constitution half) and difficult terrain, disintegrates dead, and negates sound and nonmagical light for concentration up to 1 min
Fortune's Favor (W2 Divi): (Minute) R60' Target can reroll an attack, ability check, or save, or force a foe reroll on an attack, within 1 hr (+Level affects +1 target)
Gift Of Alacrity (W1 Divi): (Minute) Willing touched gains +1d8 initiative for 8 hr
Gravity Fissure (W6 Evoc): (Action) 5'x100' line inflicts 8d8 HP force (save Constitution half) and pulls and inflicts 8d8 HP force on creatures within 10' (save Constitution negates) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Gravity Sinkhole (W4 Evoc): (Action) R120' 20' radius inflicts 5d10 HP force and pulls toward its center (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Immovable Object (W2 Tran): (Action) Touched 10 lb object becomes movable only by specified creatures or by using a specified password (save Strength allows moving it 10') and can support 4000 lb for 1 hr (+Level increases Strength DC by +5 or +10, object support to 8,000 or 20,000 lb, and duration to 24 hr or permanent at level 4 or 6)
Magnify Gravity (W1 Tran): (Action) R60' 10' radius inflicts 2d8 HP force and half Speed until the end of a creature's next turn (save Constitution half HP only) and makes objects immovable (save Strength negates), until the start of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Pulse Wave (W3 Evoc): (Action) 30' cone inflicts 6d6 HP force and a choice of a 15' pull or push (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP and a +5' pull or push)
Ravenous Void (W9 Evoc): (Action) R1000' 20' radius inflicts 5d10 HP force and restrains (save Strength each rd ends), destroys dead and nonmagical objects, and creates a 120' radius difficult terrain that pulls toward its center (save Strength negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Reality Break (W8 Conj): (Action) R60' Inflicts loss of reactions (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) and, at the end of each turn, one of: 6d12 HP psychic and stunned until the end of the turn; 8d12 HP force (save Dexterity half); 30' teleportation, 10d12 HP force, and knocked prone; 10d12 HP cold and blinded until the end of the turn, for concentration up to 1 min
Sapping Sting (W0 Necr): (Action) R30' Inflicts 4d4 HP and knocked prone (save Constitution negates)
Temporal Shunt (W5 Tran): (Reaction) R120' Cast as a reaction in response to a target's attack or spell casting, causes the target to disappear until the start of its next turn and cancels its action (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target within 30' of the first)
Tether Essence (W7 Necr): (Action) R60' Two targets lose and gain hit points identically (save Constitution negates; the save has disadvantage if the targets are within 30' of each other) for concentration up to 1 hr or until either is reduced to 0 hit points
Time Ravage (W9 Necr): (Action) R90' Inflicts 10d12 HP necrotic, disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves, half Speed, and death in 30 days from old age (save Constitution half HP only)
Wristpocket (W2 Conj): (Action) Self can move a touched 5 lb object to and from an extradimensional space for concentration up to 1 hr [R]
Magic Notes:
Greater Portent: Has increased Portent effects
Arcane Recovery: Can recover 10 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum) at the end of a short rest once per long rest
Divination Savant: Requires half the normal time and cost to copy divination spells into spellbook
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Expert Divination: Casting a divination spell restores a lower-level expended slot of up to level 5
Portent: Can replace a visible target's attack, ability check, or save with a pre-rolled value 3 times per long rest
Signature Spells: Can cast 2 chosen W3 spells without expending a spell slot once per short rest
Spell Mastery: Can cast a chosen W1 spell and a chosen W2 spell without expending a spell slot; can change the choices after 8 hr of study
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the wizard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
The Third Eye: Can use an action once per short rest to gain 60' Darkvision, 60' ethereal sight, the ability to read any language, or 10' invisibility sight until the next rest
